programme.title: Tiny Treehouse Escape

programme.desc: The town of Sodus shows up as the Maxams unveil The Finger Lakes Treehouse Resort.

programme.desc: Class is officially in session as Brad and Jennifer head to three different sites to meet their student flippers.

programme.title: Flip U

programme.title: Flip U
programme.desc: Brad and Jennifer introduce the class to Ashley, a color specialist from Glidden.

programme.title: Flip U
programme.desc: Brad and Jennifer stop by each site to see if the flippers have completed their last homework assignment.

programme.title: Flip U

programme.title: Flip U

programme.title: Backyarding

programme.title: Backyarding

programme.title: Backyarding
